message:
feat: gt doctor check for testutil symlinks to canonical copy (gt-sm59)

Add testutil-symlink rig check that verifies crew and refinery/rig
internal/testutil/ directories are symlinks to mayor/rig/internal/testutil/.
Detects real directories (drift risk), broken symlinks, and wrong targets.
Includes --fix support to replace real dirs with relative symlinks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
